title: nassauvia lagascae var. lanata
intro: Nassauvia lagascae var. lanata, also known as woolly nassauvia, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the Andes mountain range in South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Nassauvia lagascae var. lanata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
